en_source: Your backup is locked with this passphrase before it leaves your phone. We store only what we cannot read, so we can never unlock it for you.

notes: AI draft (Claude, 2026-07-07) — STANDARD: native review pass — SECURITY CLAIM (zero-knowledge model): 'we store only what we cannot read' must survive translation literally — Feeling tags rendered as nouns (سکون، تھکن…) to stay gender-neutral — flag if house style prefers adjectives
